title: Magic Season Decorative Glass Bottles with Cork Stoppers (3.3 fl oz. Spherical Bottles / 6 Pcs)
description:
About this item
STYLISH STORAGE: These transparent spherical glass bottles with cork stoppers provide decorative storage for your kitchen or bar in sets of six bottles.
VERSATILE CONTAINERS: These transparent glass bottles with cork stoppers make ideal containers for holding liquids, spices, craft supplies, and more around the home or office.
ELEGANT DESIGN: The spherical shape and smooth glass construction give these bottles an attractively simple, vintage aesthetic that will complement a variety of decorative styles.
DURABLE MATERIALS: Made of sturdy glass with tight-fitting cork stoppers, these bottles are built to last and prevent leaks, keeping contents fresh and spill-free.
CONVENIENT SIZING: At 100 ml or 3 fluid ounces each, the bottles provide a generous yet manageable capacity, perfect for holding small amounts of liquids, craft supplies, and more.
› See more product details
reviews_5s: Love these! They are so cute and tiny.I love these! We went to the beach for vacation and I wanted to collect seashells. I decided I was going to collect only the teeny tiny ones and display them in jars. These are perfect! Unfortunately, they are extremely fragile, the glass is very thin. My daughter knocked one off the table and it broke. Not the sellers fault or amazon. Just should be noted if you're looking for something thicker!Using for a rooter. Works great and looks nice on the shelf with plants growing out of the. Little small for my purpose but it works. Good quality for the price.Great for my herbs etc 🖤
reviews_1s: Maybe useful for crafts etc.Jars are not crystal clear due to alot of imperfections. Jars have alot of bubbles in the glass making it hard to see the image inside, wanted to use for sand and shells but glass is defective and the cork does not seal to use for spices.
